content:
There are four places that MintFace is buidling for OM. 10K Residence is home, Omtagon is where the events happen, Geodetic Monument is a place to pay homage to the NFT gods and MintFacePlace is filled with creative artist studios.

10K Residence

10K Residence is a home environment for apartments, lofts and pods. There is a chilled vibe there most of the time, interrupted by the odd party celebrating minting a grail. See who has moved in already and how to get in.

Omtagon

The Omtagon is where people queue up to experience the latest event showing in om. It is a place for people who love seeing it live and together. Films, shows, theatre, comedy, live bands, book readings and the odd NFT minting intervention. Read more about Omtagon and how to get a mini-billboard pixel on the Omtagon.

Geodetic Monument

The Geodetic Monument is a place in the countryside, about as far from the center of om as you can get. Come here to chill and pay homage to the gods of minting. Watch a preview of the Geodetic Monument.

MintFacePlace

MintFacePlace is filled with artist studios showing work in progress and latest mints. It gives collectors a look at the broader context for minted work often overlooked through browsing marketplaces.

Each MintFace MintPass provides the holder access to all artist studios for the corresponding floor of MintFacePlace. Purple MintPass = access to purple floor and so on.

MintFace Properties in Om

MintFace Properties in OM have been built around the needs of our community of artists in the Minted book, frens in the MintFace Discord and MintFace Twitter fans. As you can see from the properties above, they are very different in look and feel reflecting the kinds of crazy, weird projects I like to undertake. These are not exclusive places. If you have an idea you can buidl it yourself for om.

I am hoping to show the way and learn what is possible then share it as I do.
